name: Vinay
title: Flutter Developer | iOS Developer | Full Stack Developer
tagline: Building polished mobile products — from native camera pipelines to on-device ML.

seo.title: Vinay | Flutter Developer, iOS Developer & Full Stack Developer
seo.description: Hire Vinay — expert Flutter developer, iOS developer (Swift/AVFoundation), and full stack developer. Portfolio of mobile apps, native iOS camera work, GraphQL/Node.js backends, and on-device ML.
seo.jobTitle: Flutter Developer | iOS Developer | Full Stack Developer

bio: I design and ship production mobile apps end-to-end — Flutter for cross-platform speed, Swift when native camera and AVFoundation matter, and on-device ML when the experience needs to work offline. I've built inspection tools, dealership event platforms, and marketplace apps used in the real world.

iosDemos.islandDetail: Native Swift developer · available for hire
iosDemos.description: I build production iOS apps with Swift — clean architecture, smooth animations, and platform-native polish.

experience.summary: Shipped field inspection tooling with native camera pipelines and on-device ML for automotive partners.
Built dealership event products across Flutter app and React marketing site on a shared Node API.
Owned mobile client and GraphQL API for a scrap marketplace — listings, chat, and order flows.

projects.title: Vehicle Inspection App
projects.tagline: Field-ready inspections with native camera + on-device ML
projects.description: Mobile inspection workflow with native iOS camera capture, guided photo sequences, and on-device ML for damage detection — built for reliability in the field.

overview.problem: Inspectors needed a fast, reliable way to capture structured vehicle photos and flag damage — even with poor connectivity. Generic camera UIs weren't enough; the flow had to be guided and offline-capable.
howItWorks: Inspector starts a job and follows a step-by-step capture checklist (angles, damage zones, VIN, odometer).
A native iOS camera module (AVFoundation) handles high-quality capture, focus, flash, and overlays for framing.
On-device ML scores images for damage hints so the UI can prompt for retakes or extra shots without waiting on a server.
Results sync when online; locally stored drafts keep work safe if the network drops mid-inspection.
whatIDid: Built the Flutter app shell: job list, inspection wizard, gallery review, and sync status UI.
Implemented a Swift/AVFoundation camera plugin for controlled capture and overlays.
Integrated on-device ML inference for damage detection cues during capture.
Designed offline-first storage and resilient upload/retry for completed inspections.
highlights: Native camera quality with Flutter UX

projects.title: Dealership Events App & Website
projects.tagline: Events, RSVPs, and attendee engagement for dealerships
projects.description: Event discovery and registration experience for car dealerships — companion mobile app plus a marketing website for schedules, RSVPs, and attendee engagement.

overview.problem: Dealerships ran launches and customer events with scattered spreadsheets and static landing pages. They needed one place for schedules, RSVPs, and day-of engagement.
howItWorks: Marketing site promotes upcoming events and collects interest / RSVPs.
Flutter app lets staff and guests browse the schedule, register, and check in.
Node.js API stores events, attendees, and registration state shared by web + mobile.
Push / in-app updates keep attendees informed when times or locations change.
whatIDid: Shipped the Flutter companion app for event discovery, RSVP, and check-in.
Built the marketing/events website in React for SEO-friendly promotion pages.
Implemented Node.js backend endpoints for events, attendees, and registrations.
Connected web and mobile to the same API so data stayed in sync.
highlights: RSVP and check-in in one flow

projects.title: Car Events Platform
projects.description: Cross-platform Flutter app for browsing, joining, and managing automotive events with real-time updates and a clean, enthusiast-first UI.

overview.problem: Car enthusiasts struggled to discover meets and track changes. Organizers needed a lightweight way to publish events and talk to attendees in real time.
howItWorks: Users browse upcoming meets by date, location, and interest tags.
Organizers create and manage events from the same app.
Firebase powers auth, event documents, and live listeners for schedule changes.
Attendees join events and see live updates without refreshing.
whatIDid: Designed and built the full Flutter UI for discovery, detail, and organizer tools.
Modeled Firebase collections for events, RSVPs, and profiles.
Wired real-time listeners so RSVPs and schedule edits update instantly.
Polished map/list views and empty states for a clean enthusiast feel.

projects.title: Scrap Marketplace
projects.tagline: Buy & sell scrap with GraphQL-backed flows
projects.description: Marketplace for buying and selling scrap materials — Flutter client backed by a Node.js + GraphQL API for listings, chat, and order flows.

overview.problem: Scrap buyers and sellers needed listings, chat, and order tracking in one app — not fragmented WhatsApp threads and spreadsheets.
howItWorks: Sellers create listings with photos, material type, weight/price, and location.
Buyers search/filter and open chats to negotiate.
GraphQL API serves listings, users, conversations, and order status to the Flutter client.
Orders move through simple states (inquiry → confirmed → completed) with notification hooks.
whatIDid: Built the Flutter marketplace UI: browse, listing detail, chat, and order history.
Designed and implemented the Node.js + GraphQL schema and resolvers.
Added auth, listing CRUD, messaging, and order state transitions.
Optimized list queries and image handling for snappy mobile performance.

testimonials.quote: Vinay delivered a rock-solid inspection app that held up in real field conditions. The native camera work and offline ML were exactly what we needed.
testimonials.author: Product Lead

testimonials.quote: Fast, thoughtful, and great at balancing Flutter speed with native quality where it counts. Our dealership events stack shipped on time and felt premium.
testimonials.author: Founder

testimonials.quote: Clear communication and excellent GraphQL/API ownership. The marketplace app was smooth for users and maintainable for our team.
testimonials.author: Engineering Manager

testimonials.quote: His Swift camera module felt truly native. Clients noticed the polish immediately compared to standard pickers.
testimonials.author: Design Lead

testimonials.quote: Reliable delivery, clear updates, and strong ownership of both mobile and API layers. Would hire again.
testimonials.author: CTO

testimonials.quote: On-device ML worked offline in the field — that alone saved us weeks of backend work and connectivity headaches.
testimonials.author: Operations Manager
